subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained to the recognition of his Lord, whilst most of the servants remained heedless thereof. Verily thy mention hath been made in the presence of the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بعرفان ربه اذ غفل عنه اکثر العباد قد ذکر ذکرک لدی المظلوم و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power of prayer, @thankfulness; gratitude
